name: baby-spike-electron
description: V0 shell spike — Electron wrapper around the shared bloom-sphere scene. Throwaway.

scripts.measure: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && electron .
scripts.dist: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.installer: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && electron-builder --win nsis
